attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 -1*(ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)) + SM.MIN_VAL AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
 ,-1*(ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)) + SM.MIN_VAL1  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   
 ,A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
 ,BK_COMPANY_CD               
 ,BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  
 ,'DEBIT' AS DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE       
 ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )  AS EFFECTIVE_DT                  
 ,'FISCAL YEAR' AS EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD       
 ,EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT
 ,EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT    
 ,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY  
 ,'N' AS INTERCOMPANY_ROLE             
 ,'UNK' AS JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE       
 ,'UNK'JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD    
 ,NULL AS OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT      
 ,0 AS RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT   
 ,RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT  
 ,0 AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT         
 ,RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT  
 ,NULL AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD 
 ,NULL AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD    
 ,NULL AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD
 ,NULL AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD 
 ,NULL AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD 
 ,NULL AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD 
 ,0 AS RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT      
 ,RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
 ,'CFN' AS SS_CD                          
 ,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT 
 ,DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT   
 ,DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT    
 ,DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
 ,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
 ,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD           
 ,DD_BK_DEPT_CD                 
 ,DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
  , CASE WHEN WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID is not null  
         AND WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = 5 THEN 'MC' 
        WHEN WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID IS NOT NULL 
         AND WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID <> 5 THEN 'MO'  
        WHEN NSOBTV.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT =5 THEN 'UC' ELSE 'UO' 
   END AS DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD  
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               
  ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS  EDW_CREATE_DTM                
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS  EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 , DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
 ,'FA ELIMINATION'JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      
 ,-999 AS RU_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY 
 ,-999 AS EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID         
 ,-999 AS JEL_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY 
 ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) AS JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DTM    
 ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )  AS DV_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DT  
 ,A.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE         AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS POSTED_DTM                    
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
 NFAC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
 ,NFAC.BK_COMPANY_CD          
 ,NFAC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD         AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
 ,NFAC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT   AS EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT
 ,NFAC.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT        AS EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT    
 ,NFAC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
 ,SUM(NFAC.ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT )  AS RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT           
 ,SUM(NFAC.ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ) AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT       
 ,SUM(NFAC.ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT )AS RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
 ,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT 
  ,NGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT AS DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT   
 ,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT AS DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT    
 ,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AS  DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
 ,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE  AS DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
 ,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD           
 ,NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS DD_BK_DEPT_CD                 
 ,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD  
 ,(NFAC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ NFAC.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT    AS   DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT               
 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST  NFAC
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  NGLA
   ON  NFAC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
 AND   NFAC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
 INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
 ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (NFAC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ NFAC.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
 WHERE   FISCAL_YEAR_AGE <3  AND RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT >= 201608
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,10,11,12,13,14,15,16,17,18
   ) A
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOBTV
   ON   A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =NSOBTV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY     
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP WECSM
  ON     WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOBTV.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
   AND WECSM.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'
   AND WECSM.COMPANY = A.BK_COMPANY_CD 
   AND WECSM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = A.EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT
   AND   WECSM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  = A.EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT
 
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT COALESCE (CASE WHEN MIN(BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT) >=0 THEN 0
 ELSE MIN(BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT) END, 0) MIN_VAL,
 COALESCE (CASE WHEN MIN(BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT) >=0 THEN 100
 ELSE MIN(BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT) END, 100) MIN_VAL1 FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EXPENSE_MEASURE) SM
 ON 1=1

SELECT
BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   
,DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE       
,EFFECTIVE_DT                  
,EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD      
,EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT    
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,INTERCOMPANY_ROLE             
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE       
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD    
,OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT      
,RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT          
,RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT           
,RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT      
,RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT       
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD    
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD 
,RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT   
,RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
,SS_CD                         
,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT 
,DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT   
,DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT    
,DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD           
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD                 
,DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
,DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      
,RU_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY 
,EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID         
,JEL_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY 
,JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DTM    
,DV_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DT  
,'FA_ELIM' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE            
,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,POSTED_DTM                    
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_EXPENSE_MEASURE_ELIM A
where not exists 
(  
select 1 from   $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EXPENSE_MEASURE MEXM
WHERE 
A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY= MEXM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND A.BK_COMPANY_CODE= MEXM.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = MEXM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
AND A.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = MEXM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
AND MEXM.TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'FA_ELIM'
)
